name: agentping
description: Notify when AI agents finish and send concise completion summaries.

interface.shortDescription: Ping you when AI agents finish.
interface.longDescription: AgentPing sends concise PushDeer summaries when Codex or Claude Code finishes without changing the original response.
defaultPrompt: Configure AgentPing notifications for Codex or Claude Code.
Test the local AgentPing PushDeer notification command.
